nasb.text: Then they cried out to the Lord in their trouble; He delivered them out of their distresses.

esv.text: Then they cried to the Lord in their trouble, and he delivered them from their distress.

cnv.text: 他們在急難中呼求耶和華， 耶和華就救他們脫離困苦；

ccb.text: 他们在危难中呼求耶和华， 祂就拯救他们脱离困境，

csbs.text: 于是他们在危难中向耶和华呼求， 他就解救他们脱离困境；
